creator: filis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 155948
patch to make duply work with GnuPG 2.1

It seems that duply doesn't play well with GPG 2.1, which is the default in FreeBSD ports. It can't extract the secret key to the profile directory since GPG now requires the key's passphrase for that.
I submitted a patch to the duplicity/duply mailing list, but don't know if and when it's going to be included:

https://lists.nongnu.org/archive/html/duplicity-talk/2015-03/msg00018.html
